title: Read Campaign Analytics
lede: See how your campaigns are performing: live progress and connect rates in Campaign Stats, and per-campaign cost and outcome breakdowns in Campaign Reports.

steps.title: Open Campaign Stats
steps.content:
1. In the left menu, under Campaigns, open Campaign Stats.
  2. This monitoring view shows your campaigns side by side with their live status and key metrics.

images.caption: Campaign Stats gives a live monitoring view across campaigns
Campaign Stats gives a live monitoring view across campaigns

steps.title: Understand the key numbers
steps.content:
Across the analytics views you'll see:

  • Progress — attempts made out of total possible attempts.
  • Connect rate — the share of calls that reached a person.
  • Contacts / remaining — how many people are left to dial.
  • Total cost — what the campaign has spent so far.

You'll also see these on each campaign's Overview tab and in the Progress column of the main Campaigns list.

steps.title: Open Campaign Reports
steps.content:
1. In the left menu, under Campaigns, open Campaign Reports.
  2. This view breaks down performance per campaign — calls, outcomes, and cost — so you can compare campaigns against each other.

images.caption: Campaign Reports breaks down calls, outcomes, and cost per campaign
Campaign Reports breaks down calls, outcomes, and cost per campaign

steps.title: Act on what you see
steps.content:
• Low connect rate? Adjust your calling hours and time zone so you reach people when they're available.
  • Costs climbing faster than results? Pause the campaign and refine the dial list or the AI agent.
  • Want per-call detail? Open a campaign and use its Overview tab, or review individual calls in Call Center → Call Logs.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: Turn insights into a better-performing campaign.

cards.description: Set pacing, hours, and the AI agent.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
